match.userMessage:
Generate the visual prompt for the starting frame of this scene.

<CURRENT_SCENE>
{
  "sceneId": "scene-2",
  "sceneNumber": 2,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Quick-cut to locked beauty frame: overhead flat-lay of keyboard, hands mid-keystroke, golden warmth in highlights.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Overhead close-up of typing keyboard",
    "durationSeconds": 4,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR TWILIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Emphasize tactile urgency of preparation"
  }
}
</CURRENT_SCENE>

<SCENE_BEFORE>
(Context for position/lighting continuity only)
{
  "sceneId": "scene-1",
  "sceneNumber": 1,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "FADE IN:\n\nINT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR TWILIGHT - WIDE 16:9 CINEMATIC\n\nBright natural window light floods the airy space, crisp whites (#FFFFFF) and warm beiges (#F0E6D3) on sleek desks. Rain streaks the vast glass wall like tactile ink veins. A REPORTER (30s, effortlessly cool, pink blouse #D4536D pop against neutral skin tones) types furiously at a glowing terminal. Handheld micro-movement captures fingers pressing matte black keys (#1A1A1A), clack-clack echoing sensory-sharp. Shallow DOF isolates key textures, screen glow airy high-key.\n\n                    REPORTER\n          (urgent whisper)\n        We go live in ten.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "REPORTER",
        "line": "We go live in ten.",
        "tone": "urgent whisper"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Reporter typing urgently in modern newsroom",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR TWILIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Establish the busy newsroom and reporter's urgency ahead of live broadcast"
  }
}
</SCENE_BEFORE>

<SCENE_AFTER>
(Context for action setup only)
{
  "sceneId": "scene-3",
  "sceneNumber": 3,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "INT. NEWSROOM CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS - HANDHELD DYNAMIC\n\nPRODUCER (40s, rumpled linen shirt, editorial energy) rushes in, clutching a single printed sheet. Close-up macro: fingers grip crisp paper edge, subtle texture crinkle under directional shadow. Footsteps punchy on polished floor.\n\n                    PRODUCER\n          (breathless, thrusting paper)\n        Story just broke. Viral sensation --\n        a breakthrough serum dropping tonight.\n        Fresh from the lab: #E8F4E8 glow in a drop.\n        We need this on air NOW.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "PRODUCER",
        "line": "Story just broke. Viral sensation -- a breakthrough serum dropping tonight. Fresh from the lab: #E8F4E8 glow in a drop. We need this on air NOW.",
        "tone": "breathless"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Producer rushes in with breaking news",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM CORRIDOR - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour twilight",
    "storyBeat": "Introduce breaking story about the serum"
  }
}
</SCENE_AFTER>

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>

response.content: {"visual":{"fullPrompt":"Overhead flat-lay locked beauty frame in modern social-first editorial style with tactile energy and golden hour warmth, REPORTER in pink blouse #D4536D with hands mid-keystroke fingers tensed pressing matte black keys #1A1A1A on mechanical keyboard poised for clacking urgency, shallow depth of field hyper-detailed textures on keys and fingertips against sleek desk surface in airy modern newsroom, bright natural window light flooding from vast rain-streaked glass walls casting crisp whites #FFFFFF and warm beiges #F0E6D3, glowing terminal nearby emitting high-key airy screen glow, golden highlights rimming edges with subtle anamorphic flares, bokeh blurred background of polished floors and distant urban twilight skyline, 16:9 cinematic composition emphasizing sensory-sharp preparation tension.","negativePrompt":"faces visible, full body shots, holographic screens, floating interfaces, text overlays, subtitles, deep shadows, underexposed areas, motion blur on hands, cluttered composition, heavy diffusion, cold lighting","components":{"sceneDescription":"Quick-cut locked overhead flat-lay capturing hands mid-keystroke on keyboard in urgent preparation, tactile details emphasized in modern newsroom.","subject":"REPORTER's hands in pink blouse sleeves mid-keystroke on matte black keyboard, fingers tensed with potential energy.","environment":"INT. MODERN NEWSROOM - GOLDEN HOUR TWILIGHT, sleek desks, vast rain-streaked glass walls, glowing terminals, airy open space with warm beiges and crisp whites.","lighting":"Bright natural window light with golden hour warmth in highlights, high-key airy glow from screens, clean directional shadows, rim lighting on textures.","camera":"Overhead flat-lay directly above, locked beauty frame, shallow depth of field isolating foreground keys and hands.","composition":"Tight close-up on keyboard and hands centered, bokeh background fading to newsroom elements, balanced negative space around edges.","style":"Modern social-first product photography, tactile editorial energy like Rhode Skin and Glossier, fresh sensory effortlessly cool.","technical":"16:9 aspect ratio, ultra high resolution, hyper-detailed textures, sharp focus on tactile surfaces, cinematic film stock.","atmosphere":"Tactile urgency and dynamic preparation, golden twilight mood with immediate real-life energy."}},"continuity":{"characterTags":["reporter_newsroom_typing"],"environmentTag":"modern_newsroom_golden_twilight_rain","elementTags":[],"colorPalette":"#FFFFFF, #F0E6D3, #D4536D, #1A1A1A, #E8F4E8","lightingSetup":"bright natural window light golden hour warmth, high-key airy, screen glows with golden highlights","styleTag":"modern_editorial_tactile_flatlay_golden"}}
